Name: Taxonomy of Intelligence
Description: A minimal Effortless demo that classifies intelligences (humans, animals, AI systems) by aggregating per-capability assessments through a multi-hop calculated-field DAG.

Capabilities.Description: Cognitive capabilities being assessed. Tiered foundational/composite/emergent and weighted by importance.

schema.name: CapabilitiesId
schema.Description: Slug for the capability (e.g. 'reasoning'). First raw field is the PK.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display name (derived from PK).

schema.name: Description
schema.Description: Short prose describing the capability.

schema.name: Tier
schema.Description: Capability tier: foundational, composite, or emergent.

schema.name: Weight
schema.Description: Importance multiplier used when computing WeightedScore on each Assessment.

data.Description: Storing, retaining, and recalling information across time.
Sensing the environment and interpreting raw input into structure.
Novel synthesis, divergent thinking, and open-ended generation.

Intelligences.Description: Agents being classified by the taxonomy. Each Intelligence's TaxonomyClass is derived from the rollup of its Assessments.

schema.name: IntelligencesId
schema.Description: Slug for the intelligence (e.g. 'human'). First raw field is the PK.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display name (derived from PK).

schema.name: Description
schema.Description: Short prose describing what this intelligence is.

schema.name: Substrate
schema.Description: Substrate kind: biological, digital, or collective.

schema.name: AssessmentCount
schema.Description: How many capabilities this intelligence has been assessed on.

schema.name: TotalWeightedScore
schema.Description: Sum of WeightedScore across all this intelligence's assessments. Second hop in the DAG.

schema.name: TaxonomyClass
schema.Description: Taxonomic bucket derived from TotalWeightedScore. Third hop in the DAG.

data.Description: A cephalopod problem-solver with distributed cognition.
A large language model trained on broad text.

Assessments.Description: Per-capability scores for each intelligence. The junction table whose calculated WeightedScore feeds the rollup on Intelligences.

schema.name: AssessmentsId
schema.Description: Slug encoding the intelligence-capability pair (e.g. 'human-reasoning'). First raw field is the PK.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display name (derived from PK).

schema.name: Intelligence
schema.Description: FK to Intelligences. Holds the value of Intelligences.IntelligencesId.

schema.name: Capability
schema.Description: FK to Capabilities. Holds the value of Capabilities.CapabilitiesId.

schema.name: RawScore
schema.Description: User-editable assessment score from 0 to 100. Edit this in the UI to watch the cascade.

schema.name: IntelligenceName
schema.Description: Display name pulled from the related Intelligences row.

schema.name: CapabilityName
schema.Description: Display name pulled from the related Capabilities row.

schema.name: CapabilityTier
schema.Description: Tier (foundational/composite/emergent) pulled from the related Capabilities row.

schema.name: CapabilityWeight
schema.Description: Importance multiplier pulled from the related Capabilities row.

schema.name: WeightedScore
schema.Description: RawScore scaled by the capability's Weight. First hop in the DAG.

_meta._CMCC_Summary: Hand-authored rulebook for a minimal taxonomy-of-intelligence demo.
